pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states 'Save the document as /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/box_model.FCStd'. Confirmed in setup_task.sh which removes this file to ensure clean state, and in env setup which creates /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD directory.
Task description explicitly requires 'Length=60 mm'. Verified in FreeCAD Part Box documentation which confirms 'Length' is the X-direction dimension property.
Task description explicitly requires 'Width=40 mm'. Verified in FreeCAD Part Box documentation which confirms 'Width' is the Y-direction dimension property.
Task description explicitly requires 'Height=25 mm'. Verified in FreeCAD Part Box documentation which confirms 'Height' is the Z-direction dimension property.
Task description specifies all dimensions in millimeters (mm). FreeCAD documentation confirms default unit is millimeters.
Task description states 'Part workbench active'. Confirmed in setup_freecad.sh which sets AutoloadModule to PartWorkbench in user.cfg.

pi_items.metadata_value: Part > Primitives > Create a primitive (select Box)
pi_items.verified_value: Part > Primitives > Create a primitive (select Box)
pi_items.source: Task description explicitly provides this menu path. Verified in FreeCAD documentation (Part_Primitives.md) which confirms this access method exists.
Task description explicitly provides this alternative menu path. Verified in FreeCAD documentation which confirms both menu paths access the same Part::Box tool.

Task specifies output file must be box_model.FCStd. Verified in FreeCAD documentation that FCStd is the standard FreeCAD file format, which is a ZIP archive containing Document.xml with object properties.
verifier.py comment states 'Check Length=60, Width=40, Height=25 (within 0.1mm tolerance)'. This is the tolerance used for dimension verification.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a Box primitive in FreeCAD's Part workbench with exact dimensions: Length=60 mm (X-direction), Width=40 mm (Y-direction), and Height=25 mm (Z-direction). The box can be created through either 'Part > Primitives > Create a primitive (select Box)' or 'Part > Box' menu paths. The completed model must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/box_model.FCStd in FreeCAD's native FCStd format (a ZIP archive containing XML). The dimensions must be set correctly in the Properties panel and verified within a tolerance of ±0.1 mm. The task is a synthetic training exercise testing basic CAD modeling operations: object creation, property modification, and file saving.
